notes: Default gravity deck for the Empress / riverboat. Mixes warm beats (a neighbor swings by, the upper deck bears) with pressure beats (the river noses higher, a guest cancels). Endgame cards live at the bottom of the pile.

deck.title: the kettle finds itself
deck.flavor: the kettle has come to a boil without you. somebody is going to want tea in three minutes.

deck.title: a bird lands on the upper deck
deck.flavor: a small grey bird that does not belong to this season.

deck.title: a call from the bank
deck.flavor: someone shouting your name from the dock. unhurried, friendly.

deck.title: the neighbor swings by
deck.flavor: the neighbor steps onto the gangway, brings something in a covered dish.

deck.title: the river takes a breath
deck.flavor: the boat lifts an inch, lowers an inch. the kettle steadies.

deck.title: the tomato vine yields
deck.flavor: two new fruits, ready, where you left one.

deck.title: a guest is late
deck.flavor: the lounge has the shape of a person who is not in it yet.

deck.title: a pot boils dry
deck.flavor: you weren't watching the pot. the bottom is dark.

deck.title: the river widow remembers
deck.flavor: she has paused over the soup. she is remembering something.

deck.title: frasier walks past on the bank
deck.flavor: he doesn't wave. he is carrying something rectangular.

deck.title: the garden in full sun
deck.flavor: the upper deck is briefly the brightest thing on the river.

deck.title: the table settles
deck.flavor: the long table is suddenly the warmest thing in the boat. somebody at it is laughing.

deck.title: a storm upriver
deck.flavor: the radio in the wheelhouse has come on by itself. weather.

deck.title: the river noses higher
deck.flavor: the hull is heavier in the water than it was an hour ago.

deck.title: the meal finds itself
deck.flavor: everyone has stopped talking. they are eating. that's the moment the dinner becomes the dinner.
